nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Keep-a-Changelog history of the τ kernel from v0.0.1-alpha through the unreleased v0.1.2-pre, documenting the M0–M6 milestones, the v0.1.1 post-audit refactor, and the v0.1.2 full removal of CI/CD tooling for a pure-local project.
nodes.languageNotes: FR-CA Keep-a-Changelog format with 47 sections; versions in reverse-chronological order with Added/Changed/Removed/Fixed groupings.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Operational rulebook for the TauGo project: doctrine (what the τ kernel is and is not), the 7 forbidden anti-patterns guarded by tests, the strict 4-layer Clean Architecture, the I1–I5 invariants and three dimensions, the five Refus cases, essential commands, and coding/editorial conventions.
nodes.languageNotes: FR-CA project memory file driving agent-team orchestration; cross-references PRD.md and chap. III.8 of the InteroperabiliteAgentique monograph throughout.

nodes.name: PRD.md
nodes.summary: Canonical V0.3 product requirements document for the τ kernel, organized in five blocks: strategic framing, operationalized theory (τ operator, three dimensions, five invariants), target architecture and data model, the 8-step dispatch algorithm and adaptive calibration, execution discipline, and the V1 roadmap with success criteria.
nodes.languageNotes: FR-CA canonical spec with 75 sections; the single source of truth for theory, data model, and dispatch pseudo-algorithm that CLAUDE.md and README defer to.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project entry-point documentation presenting the τ kernel doctrine and anti-goals, quick-start commands, the 4-layer architecture, usage examples (tau decide, tau calibrate, Go embedding of Kernel.Decide, fuzz/E2E), the v0.1.0→v0.1.2-pre status, invariant statuses, and a documentation index.
nodes.languageNotes: FR-CA top-level README linking to an online interactive dashboard and indexing the spec, theory, ADRs, and archives.

nodes.name: 0009-types-erreurs-typees.md
nodes.summary: Architecture decision record establishing typed error values (DispatchError, RefusError, CalibrationError) and errors.Is/As-compatible sentinels in the populated internal/errors package, with consequences and rejected alternatives.

nodes.name: 0012-golden-corpus-calibration-schema.md
nodes.summary: Architecture decision record resolving the C1-01 debt by regenerating the golden calibration corpus to the CorpusEntry schema via cmd/generate-corpus --scored, re-pinning its canonical hash, and re-enabling CLI corpus validation in cmd/tau/calibrate.go.
